Section 50 Routing Denial

Status: denied
Explanation: Capability requested: codegen. Applied trust floor private. Applied private-only tenancy filter. Applied enterprise policy filter: trust >= private and tenancy >= tenant. Filtered outage providers. Filtered providers with missing or mismatched secrets. All providers were denied by policy, health, cost, or secret posture.
Chosen provider: none
